extortion.description: National Waste Associates (NWA) is a family-owned waste management consultant that specializes in providing tailored commercial and industrial recycling solutions. They serve various industries including construction, healthcare, retail, and hospitality, by optimizing waste management plans and significantly reducing costs for organizations with multiple locations across the U.S. and Canada. With a focus on sustainability, NWA has been recognized for diverting over 90% of waste from landfills and provides ongoing gap analyses and customized reporting for their clients. Their extensive database of hauler relationships allows them to pair clients with the best vendors for their specific waste management needs.
